entries.example_english: Good evening, where are you from?
Goodbye, be careful on the road
Peace be upon you, is anyone home?
And upon you peace, please come in
My older sibling lives in Padang
My younger sibling is still small
My grandmother is good at sewing
Minang rendang is the most delicious
The river is clear and cold
The sun is blazing at midday
There are many stars in the sky
Dark clouds, a storm is coming
A big rock on the road
Buffalo is the symbol of Minangkabau
There are many ducks in the rice field
A long snake in the forest
There are many monkeys in the forest
Mother is cooking in the kitchen
The dining table is full of food
Black peci worn to the mosque
I want to go to the market
Writing a letter to a friend
I want to buy a shirt
He/she sells vegetables at the market
I am looking for a friend
I want to go home now
I want to go out for a moment
Bring an umbrella, it might rain
Goods at the market are cheap
Before, I lived in the village
Wake up early in the morning
In the afternoon I take a walk
At night there are many stars
The house is south of the market
The sun rises in the east
The sun sets in the west
The house is on the left side of the road
The book is on top of the table
The cat is under the chair
In front of the house there is a tree
The garden is behind the house
I go to the market in the morning
The bridge is over the river
I am sad hearing that news
He/she is shy in front of people
I am amazed by Minang nature
I am proud to be Minang
I was late because of the rain
If it rains, I won't go
Study so that you become smart
The Rumah Gadang has a curved roof
Minang people are known for going abroad
Randai is performed at traditional events
The sound of the saluang is melodious
Big wedding celebration in the village
The story of Malin Kundang is famous

entries.english: Small prayer house / Islamic boarding school
